reviews.comment:
El fin de semana de carnaval un loco le quito al empleado el surtidor y lo golpeó gente enferma después nos echó nafta a todos, vino un policía y lo freno a la fuerza actuó te bien lástima q su superior no intervino y no lo llevaron a la comisaría , estaba loco nos faltó el respeto. A todas las mujeres nos arruinó el sabado, fueron tres horas de horror! El pobre empleado todo lastimado y no hizo la denuncia por miedo a perder el trabajo, yo dejé mis datos a un oficial. Ya q me baño el auto de nafta! Y a tres vehículos más.....La mujer del desquiciado defendía a ese animal violento, pobre la q le espera estaba apurado ya q había cola y al final perdimos 3 horas de mis vacaciones.

(Translated by Google)
During Carnival weekend, a crazy man grabbed the gas pump from the attendant and beat him up. He was a sick person, then he poured gas all over us. A police officer came and stopped him by force; he acted well, it's a shame his superior didn't intervene and they didn't take him to the station. He was crazy and disrespected us. He ruined Saturday for all the women; it was three hours of horror! The poor employee was all hurt and didn't file a report for fear of losing his job. I left my information with an officer since he doused my car with gas! And three other vehicles too... The deranged man's wife was defending that violent animal. She's in for a rough time; he was in a hurry because there was a line, and in the end, we lost three hours of my vacation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROVpleU9BEAE
